h3: Stuart Anderson MP South Shropshire
text_excerpt: Advice Surgeries | Stuart Anderson MP Skip to main content Main navigation Home About Me South Shropshire Parliament News Contact Advice Surgeries Tweet Advice surgeries are for personal matters which you need to raise with Stuart. You must book an appointment before attending a surgery. You can register your interest using the link below and the office will contact you to arrange an appointment. Upcoming dates: 22nd May - Bridgnorth 5th June - Condover 3rd July - Chirbury 24th July - Bridgnorth Register your interest Please note: Stuart's advice surgeries are often booked up far in advance. Please do not consider yourself to have an appointment booked until this has been confirmed by Stuart's office, who will provide you with a precise time and location.
